name: worker_class
description: Direction A PR 5: workers earn a class after WORKER_CLASS_THRESHOLD=8s WORKING in a class-bearing room. Place a Mine on Worker1's spawn, run for 12s. Worker arrives ~1s, accrues class progress for ~8s, becomes a 'Miner' around t=9. With the 1.5× class bonus, ore production after class-up is 0.75/s. Pass: 1 worker is classed.
